headline: PNC Financial Services Group (PNC) Stock Valuation Check After Strong Recent Performance
summary: PNC Financial Services Group stock: recent performance snapshot PNC Financial Services Group (PNC) has drawn investor attention after a strong recent stretch, with the stock up 1.6% over the past day, about 4.1% over the past week, and roughly 11.3% over the past month. That move comes alongside a past 3 months return of about 18.2% and a 1 year total return near 41.7%, placing recent trading in the context of a much longer upswing for the Pittsburgh based bank. See our latest analysis for...
